description: §52.15 — a server-authority read route (`/__serverLoad/products`) that opts OUT of the gate (per-var auth="none") under an app that declares auth elsewhere (<program auth="required">) fires W-SERVERLOAD-UNGATED (warning). The <page>/<program> auth redirect does NOT cover the data route — every data endpoint is its own gate, so the opted-out route is reachable by anonymous requests.
rationale: §52.15: the serverLoad data route default-inherits the enclosing auth requirement; opting out with auth="none" makes it anonymously reachable while the app is otherwise auth-aware. The nudge surfaces the Fork-4 footgun. SEVERITY ESCALATION (ss60 W2): this security-floor code fires only a WARNING and is unpinned — PA/user to rule whether an ungated server-authority read route should be a freeze-blocking ERROR.
